name: PublishApi
description: Shared Maya-side library for resolving publish destinations from Project Editor's pipeline metadata and creating versioned publish folders — the single source of truth ModelPublisher/RigPublisher/AnimationPublisher and UkoreBrowser build on. Contributes its maya-scripts folder (plus UkoreHub's own app root) to the Maya Launcher env bridge — does not launch Maya itself and has no UI of its own.
